steps.title: Read the vertex form
steps.content: It is in vertex form. In $y=a(x-h)^2+k$, the vertex is $(h,k)$, so the graph has vertex $(4.8{,}432)$.

steps.title: Interpret the maximum height
steps.content: Because $-16$ is negative, the parabola opens downward, so the vertex gives the maximum height. The drone reaches $432$ feet at $4.8$ seconds. The answer is B.
